visa.title: Visa Eligibility Check
visa.subtitle: Check your eligibility for a visa to Japan
visa.not_eligible_desc: Based on your passport origin and destination, you are not eligible for this visa type at this time.
visa.tip_1: Check if your passport is valid for at least 6 months.
visa.tip_2: Verify if you need a different visa category (e.g., Business, Student).
visa.tip_3: Contact the nearest embassy or consulate for more information.
visa.tip_4: Ensure your nationality is correctly selected.

ocr.title: Complete Your Application
ocr.subtitle: Please scan your passport to automatically fill in the required details.
ocr.upload_desc: Click to browse or drag and drop
ocr.tip_1: Ensure the passport is flat and well-lit
ocr.tip_2: Avoid glare or shadows on the data page
ocr.tip_3: Make sure all text is sharp and readable
ocr.tip_4: Include the entire data page in the frame
ocr.success_desc: Your visa application has been successfully submitted. Our team will process it shortly.

admin.search_placeholder: Search by name, visa, or status...
admin.no_orders: No orders found matching your criteria.
